title: excoecaria bodenbenderi
intro: Excoecaria bodenbenderi, a plant species belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae, is commonly known as the poison tree or the manchineel tree. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Excoecaria bodenbenderi include treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams, although it is essential to note that its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
